name: Ultra-high income - HK$5,000,000 single (standard rate kicks in)
description: At this income level, the standard rate (15%) produces lower tax than progressive rates (17% marginal). This is where the standard rate cap benefits high earners.

sources.description: Manual calculation: MPF capped at 18000. Net income = 4982000. NCI = 4982000 - 132000 = 4850000. Progressive: 16000 + 4650000*17% = 16000 + 790500 = 806500. Standard: 4982000 * 15% = 747300 (all within tier 1 of 5M). Tax = min(806500, 747300) = 747300 (standard rate wins).
